title: The Strange Color of Your Body's Tears
original_title: L'Étrange Couleur des larmes de ton corps
overview: Returning home from a business trip to discover his wife missing, a man delves deeper and deeper into a surreal kaleidoscope of half-baked leads, seduction, deceit, and murder.
